prompt: Replace the background in the source image with a sunset scene, preserving only the foreground as indicated in the depth map.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the source image) to replace its current background. The new background should depict a vibrant sunset, characterized by warm, golden hour lighting and a sky with a gradient of oranges, pinks, and purples, potentially with dramatic clouds. Maintain the exact appearance and position of the group of young adults in the foreground, using image 2 (the depth map) as precise guidance for foreground-background separation.
objects: group of young adults in the foreground
sky with a gradient of oranges, pinks, and purples
Quincy Market building (should not be present)
